meaning: Royal Field Artillery (英国)皇家野战炮兵
examples: Severe pain after RFA is uncommon, but may last a few days and require a narcotic to provide relief.
Radiofrequency ablation, sometimes referred to as RFA, is a minimally invasive treatment for cancer.
A very small Nick may be made in your skin to make it easier to pass the RFA electrode into your liver.
The RFA procedure is usually repeated a few months later, with a smaller HALO device.
Mrs Cannon, a great-grandmother from Wavertree, Liverpool, has had two courses of RFA under a local anaesthetic.
